_purpose: REFERENCE FILE -- not loaded by the engine. Copy parts you need into: asset-profiling-schema/identity.schema.custom.json. Loaded automatically by Get-SISchemaWithCustomMerge.ps1 and merged on top of asset-profiling-schema/identity.schema.locked.json.
_loadingNotes: Custom overlay:  asset-profiling-schema/identity.schema.custom.json   (you create -- this file is a sample of that)
Merge semantics: see asset-profiling-schema/endpoint.schema.custom.sample.json for the full table -- identical merge model.

fields._comment: EXAMPLE 1: brand-new bool field. purpose=risk auto-includes it in every Identity RA report's RiskFactor_Probability + RiskFactor_Probability_Detailed.
fields.name: IsContractorAccount
fields.description: True when the user account is identified as a contractor (e.g. UPN ends with @contractor.acme.com OR Department is 'Contractors').

fields._comment: EXAMPLE 2: brand-new string field surfaced from Entra extensionAttribute.
fields.name: BusinessUnitFromExtAttr3
fields.description: Copy of Entra extensionAttribute3 -- our HR feed writes BU codes there.

fields._comment: EXAMPLE 3: brand-new int field for risk weighting based on entitlement count.
fields.name: EntitlementCount
fields.description: Total count of distinct entitlement / role assignments. Used in custom RA reports to flag identities with > N entitlements.

fields._comment: EXAMPLE 4: REPLACE an existing locked field. Use cautiously -- you take full ownership.
fields.name: AccountEnabled
fields.description: Customer override -- changed default from false to true (more accurate for our environment where most accounts are active).

aggregator._comment: Per-source contributor mapping. Each id matches a field name above; source identifies which collector shape to read from.

entra._comment: Surface extra raw payload fields. These become Properties.collect.entra.<path> in the Profile_CL table.
